stemHtml: During a flight, the captain is informed that a passenger is using a portable electronic device, which is adversely affecting the aircraft's electrical avionics. What shall the captain do?

options.a: He/she must stop the passenger from using the device.
options.b: He/she may allow the device to be used with certain exceptions.
options.c: He/she may allow the device to be used at take-off and landing.
options.d: He/she may allow the device to be used except during take-off and landing.
